Natural Deduction Rules

Inline prooftree with nested delimiters:

modus ponens: \(\begin{prooftree} \AxiomC{\(\rA\supset\rB\)}\AxiomC{\(\rA\)}\BinaryInfC{\(\rB\)} \end{prooftree}\)

Display prooftree:

\[ \begin{prooftree} \AxiomC{\(\rA\supset\rB\)} \AxiomC{\(\rA\)} \RightLabel{\({\supset}\text{elim}\)} \BinaryInfC{\(\rB\)} \end{prooftree} \]

Simple inline math: \(x^2 + y^2 = z^2\) and display:

\[E = mc^2\]
